title: Financial Modeling Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger financial modeling foundations judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Financial Modeling Foundations is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Financial Modeling Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good financial modeling foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Financial Modeling Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
